title: Update VTH logo — larger size, improved color scheme

requirements.text: Redesign the VTH logo/wordmark in the sticky header (AppLayout.tsx) to be significantly larger and more visually prominent. The 'VTH' text or mark should have increased font size, weight, and/or letter spacing so it stands out clearly at a glance.

quotes: Make the VTH bigger and more visible

acceptanceCriteria: The VTH branding in the header is noticeably larger than before
The logo/wordmark is immediately readable and prominent on both mobile and desktop viewports
No other header elements are obscured by the larger logo

requirements.text: Update the color scheme of the VTH logo/wordmark to use colors that are aesthetically pleasing and harmonize with the site's existing warm earthy OKLCH design tokens (defined in frontend/src/index.css and frontend/tailwind.config.js). The new logo colors should feel cohesive with the overall palette rather than contrasting against it.

quotes: change the color scheme of the logo to be more aesthetically pleasing and to complement the website better

acceptanceCriteria: The VTH logo uses colors drawn from or harmonious with the site's warm earthy OKLCH color tokens
The logo color scheme looks polished and intentional in both light and dark modes
The logo does not clash visually with the header background or navigation elements

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui/
Color changes must remain consistent with the existing warm earthy OKLCH design token system defined in frontend/src/index.css and frontend/tailwind.config.js
nonGoals: Changing any other part of the header layout beyond the VTH logo/wordmark
Modifying the backend in any way
Replacing the text-based logo with an image asset
